
## Contact

Feel free to contact us:  

📧 Email: [jacob.vogel@med.lu.se](mailto:jacob.vogel@med.lu.se)

Find us also on:  

💼 LinkedIn: [DeMON Lab LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/demon-lab/posts/?feedView=all)

💻 GitHub: [DeMON Lab GitHub](https://github.com/DeMONLab-BioFINDER)

---

## Location

BMC C11/I12  
Sölvegatan 19  
223 62 Lund  
Sweden
